member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.AbstractDataService
member.summary: Abstract implementation of IDataService, based on ORIGAM metadata

member.name: M:Origam.DA.Service.AbstractSqlDataService.ExecuteUpdate(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Executes an arbitrary SQL command on the database.
member.param: Existing transaction id. IMPORTANT: if transactionId is NULL the command runs without a transaction!

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.CustomParameterService
member.summary: Summary description for CustomParameterService.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.CustomParameters.CurrentDateCustomParameter
member.summary: Returns current date (without time)

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.CustomParameters.CurrentDateLastMinuteCustomParameter
member.summary: Returns current date's last minute (DD.MM.YYYY 23:59:59.999)

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.CustomParameters.CurrentDateTimeCustomParameter
member.summary: Returns current date including time

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.CustomParameters.CurrentUserBusinessUnitIdParameter
member.summary: Returns current user's id

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.CustomParameters.CurrentUserIdParameter
member.summary: Returns current user's id

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.CustomParameters.CurrentUserOrganizationIdParameter
member.summary: Returns current user's id

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.CustomParameters.CurrentUserResourceIdCustomParameter
member.summary: Returns current user's resource id

members.member: Underlying timer will not process elapsed events.
Underlying timer will process elapsed events.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.Service.AbstractSqlCommandGenerator.NewValueParameterName(Origam.Schema.EntityModel.DataStructureColumn,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns name of new value parameter in Insert/Update/Delete statement

member.name: M:Origam.DA.Service.AbstractSqlCommandGenerator.OriginalParameterName(Origam.Schema.EntityModel.DataStructureColumn,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns name of original value parameter in Update or Delete statement

member.name: M:Origam.DA.Service.AbstractSqlCommandGenerator.OriginalParameterNameForNullComparison(Origam.Schema.EntityModel.DataStructureColumn,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns name of original value parameter used for testing NULL value in Update or Delete statement

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.DatasetGenerator
member.summary: Summary description for DatasetGenerator.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.Service.DatasetGenerator.LookupRelation(Origam.Schema.EntityModel.DataStructureEntity,Origam.Schema.EntityModel.IAssociation)
member.summary: We find the relation in this data structure entity relations. There may not be the same relation used twice.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.ICustomParameter
member.summary: Summary description for CustomParameter.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.IDbDataAdapterFactory
member.summary: Summary description for DbDataAdapterFactory.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.MsSqlDataService
member.summary: Summary description for MsSqlDataService.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.Folder
member.summary: This class wraps DirectoryInfo because we need it as a key in a dictionary and DirectoryInfo doesn't override hashcode ands Equals.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.PgSqlDataService
member.summary: Summary description for PgSqlDataService.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.Service.Strings
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.CannotSaveConfig
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to An error occurred when trying to save values from object id: "{0}" to configuration file: "{1}".

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.CantDDLScript
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot generate DDL script for object of type: {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ChildErrors
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Child records contain errors..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ColumnNotFoundInParentEntity
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Column not found in entity {0}. To solve this problem, please add a data structure column referencing entity {1} and column {2} to the entity {0}..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ColumnNotInStructure
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Column '{0}' not found in the data structure..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ConcurrencyViolation
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Concurrency violation while updating table {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ConfiguredPropertyNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error processing runtime configuration. Object with id "{0}" does not have the property named "{1}" or the property is not allowed to be changed in the runtime configuration file. The value cannot be set as requested in the runtime configuration file: "{2}".

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.CouldNotFindObject
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not find object with id: {0} in file.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.CouldNotFindXmlNamespace
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not find xmlNamespace for "{0}" in {1} and its base types.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.CouldNotLoadList
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not load list. Entity does not exist in the data source..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.DataChangedByOtherUser
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Data have been changed by another user..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.DataChangedByOtherUserException
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Record '{0}' in '{1}' cannot be saved because it has been changed by '{2}'..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.DataDeletedByOtherUserException
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Changes of a record '{0}' in '{1}' cannot be saved because the record has been deleted by another user..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.DataSetMustBeProvided
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Dataset must be provided when loading data by DataStructureEntity.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.DataStructureNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to DataStructureEntity not found.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.DDLForFunctionsOnly
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to DDL can be generated only for database functions.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.DefaultSetNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to DefaultSet not found.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.DuplicityError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to You entered duplicate data..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.DuplicityErrorDetailed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} {1} already exists..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.EntityNotInDataSet
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Entity with name '{0}' not found in the OrigamPersistenceProvider dataset..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.Error
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorAggregInAggreg
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Aggregated field is not supported inside an aggregated data structure column. Column: {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorArgumentEmpty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Argument cannot be empty.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorCouldNotAddRow
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not add {0}{1}..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorCouldNotDeleteRow
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not delete {0}{1}..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorCouldNotModifyRow
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not modify {0}{1}..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorCreateRelation
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not create relation {0} -> {1} for data structure {2}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorDataSetClassInvalid
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid DataSetClass..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorDatastructureNull
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to DataStructure cannot be null in order to create DataSet.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorExpressionNotSet
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Expression not set for '{0}'.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorLeftParamEmpty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Left parameter cannot be empty.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorLoadingData
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error loading data from table '{0}' into entity '{1}'{2}Message: {3}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorLookupAggreg
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Data Structure Field cannot have UseLookupValue and Aggregation both turned on. Field: {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorLookupNotSet
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Lookup not set for '{0}'.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorNoInitialState
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Initial state not set for the state machine on column: {0}.{1}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorNoParamIN
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to There has to be at least 1 parameter in the IN clause..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorNumberOfSpaces
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to NumberOfSpaces argument invalid or missing.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorOneNOTArgument
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Only 1 argument can be present to NOT operator..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorParsingConfig
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error when parsing runtime config file: "{0}".

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorRightParamEmpty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Right parameter cannot be empty.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorSettingsNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to OrigamSettings not found..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorSortOrder
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid DataStructure. SortOrder no. {0} already exists in {1}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorTwoArguments
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to There have to be at least 2 arguments for {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorTwoCONCATArguments
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to There have to be at least 2 strings to concatenate..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorWhenLoadingObjects
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error when loading objects from file: "{0}".

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorWhenProcedure
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Exception was encountered while running procedure. {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorWhenScalar
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Exception was encountered while getting scalar value. {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorWhenSettingConfigProperty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to An error occurred when trying to set runtime config value "{0}" of property "{1}" on object id: "{2}". Configuration file: "{3}".

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ErrorWhenSettingParam
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Error occured when setting parameter: {0} to value: {1}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ExceptionWhenUpdate
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Exception was encountered while updating data. For more information see Details..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.FailedUpdateRow
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Failed updating row with data from the database. DataRowState: {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.FieldMappingNotInModel
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Field Mapping not found in the model ({0}).

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.FilterSetNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to FilterSet not found.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.IntegrityError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to You deleted a record that is being used in another part of the application..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.InvalidAdapterType
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid data adapter type..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.InvalidTypeRetrieved
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Requested instance of type {1} with id {0}, but type of {2} was found instead..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.LookupListMethodTypeUnsupportedException
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Only DataStructureFilterSet method type is supported for nested queries (looked-up fields in data structures)..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.LookupTypeUnsupportedException
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Only DataServiceDataLookup is supported for nested queries (looked-up fields in data structures)..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.NoChangesInDataSet
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No changes in dataset.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.NoDataForPrimaryKey
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Model element not found by provided primary key {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.NoDataRowAfterUpdate
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Data row does not exist after update. Row has been deleted by another user..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.NoEntityNameForClass
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Class has no entity name definition.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.NoPrimaryKey
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Entity '{0}' has no primary key defined. Cannot load original values after update..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.NoProviderForMS
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to PersistenceProvider not set for MsSqlDataService.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.NoRefreshForNotPersisted
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot refresh object that has not been persisted!.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.NoRowsForDerived
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Could not find rows for a derived entity {0}.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.NoTransactionsForMSExecutedProcedure
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Transactions are not supported by MsSqlDataService.ExecuteProcedure method..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.NoValueFilterSetForLookup
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Lookup '{0}' has no ValueFilterSet.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ObjectWithSameKey
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot persist the object, another object with the same key exists already..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.OnlyMappedEntitiesToBeProcessed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Only database mapped entities can be processed by the Data Service!.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.ProviderNotInitialized
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Persistence provider not initialized. Dataset is empty..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.SortSetNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to SortSet not found.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.StructureNotInModel
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Data structure not found in the model ({0}).

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.TableMappingNotInModel
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Table Mapping not found in the model ({0}).

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Item type {0} is not implemented by DatasetGenerator.RenderExpression.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.TypeNotImplementedByDSGen1
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to DataType {0} not implemented for DataConstantReference by DatasetGenerator.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to DataType {0} not implemented for DataConstantReference by MsSqlCommandGenerator.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.TypeNotSupportedByMS
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Type {0} not supported by MsSqlCommandGenerator.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.UnknownDataSource
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unknown data source type..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.UnknownFunction
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Function not known.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.UnknownSortDirection
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unknown SortDirection.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.UnknownXmlMapping
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unknown XmlMappingType.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Aggregation type not supported.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.UnsupportedOperator
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Operator not supported.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.UnsupportedType
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Unsupported Data Type.

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.UpdateFieldUpdate
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Update field can only update tables..

member.name: P:Origam.DA.Service.Strings.WrongMetaVersion
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The current meta version of type: "{0}" is {1}, but the xml file contains version {2}.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.LocalizationCache
member.summary: Summary description for LocalizationCache.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.LocalizationCache.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes the localization cache with a single file.
member.param: Path to the file where 5 last characeters of the file name must define a locale e.g. "MyPackageName-en-US.xml

member.name: M:Origam.DA.ObjectPersistence.LocalizationCache.LoadFile(System.String)
member.summary: Loads a file.
member.param: Path to the file where 5 last characeters of the file name must define a locale e.g. "MyPackageName-en-US.xml

member.name: T:Origam.DA.DatasetTools
member.summary: Summary description for DatasetTools.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.DatasetTools.MergeDataSet(System.Data.DataSet,System.Data.DataSet,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IList{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.Object,Origam.DA.DataMergeChange}}},Origam.DA.MergeParams)
member.summary: Goes through all source tables and merges them to the target dataset's tables with same names.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.DatasetTools.ApplyPrimaryKey(System.Data.DataRow)
member.summary: Assigns a new GUID to a primary key of a row in case the data type is GUID. Otherwise does nothing.

member.name: M:Origam.DA.DatasetTools.GetDeletedRows(System.Data.DataSet,System.Data.DataSet)
member.summary: Compares two datasets and returns the top-level deleted rows (in case e.g. whole hierarchy of parent-child rows is deleted) together with their non-deleted parent rows. E.g. SalesOrder -> SalesDelivery -> SalesDeliveryDetail If SalesDelivery is deleted, also SalesDeliveryDetail is deleted. The function will return SalesDelivery row as deleted row and SalesOrder row as parent.

member.name: T:Origam.DA.SchemaDbCompareResult
member.summary: Summary description for SchemaCompareResult.
